tasks.subject: Task 0: Phase 1 — Dispatch 10 parallel research agents
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run template fidelity (R1-R4), April 2026 web research (W1-W5), and plugin audit (P1) simultaneously.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "all 10 agents complete", "acceptanceCriteria": ["R1-R4 produce findings", "W1-W5 produce findings", "P1 produces findings"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Consolidate Phase 1 findings by stack
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Merge all 10 agent reports into one prioritised findings list per stack.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "consolidated findings exist per stack", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deduplicated per stack", "priority classified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Phase 2 — Dispatch 5 parallel fix agents
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply all confirmed fixes across all 46 skills and AGENTS.md in parallel.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md", "AGENTS.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -r 'docs/superpowers' skills/ (empty)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all findings addressed", "no CVE packages", "no docs/superpowers refs", "AGENTS.md complete"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Final verification and commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify all fixes are clean, run post-fix checks, and commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "grep -r 'docs/superpowers' skills/ AGENTS.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all greps clean", "git diff matches expectations", "commit created"]}
```
